# TAPORIA

> TAPORIA crafts premium handcrafted stainless steel memory pendants with a hidden NFC core. One tap on any smartphone opens a private memory page of photographs, voice notes, music, and messages.

## Pages

- [Home](/): One tap to your memories — Founders Edition memory pendant.
- [Buy](/buy): Reserve a Founders Edition pendant. INR 4,999, limited to 100 pieces.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Four steps from a moment to a keepsake.
- [Why TAPORIA](/why): The philosophy behind the keepsake.
- [Corporate](/corporate): Bulk and corporate gifting inquiries.
- [FAQs](/faqs): Common questions about the pendant, NFC, shipping, and the memory page.
- [Support](/support): Get help with an order, delivery, or memory page.

## Optional

- [Shipping](/shipping): Dispatch timelines and coverage.
- [Returns & Refunds](/returns): Return and refund policy.
- [Cancellation](/cancellation): Order cancellation policy.
- [Privacy](/privacy): How TAPORIA handles your data.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms governing TAPORIA products and services.
